reviews.comment:
Fuimos al camping, desastroso!!! No vayan, baños sucios, mesas rotas, nada de mantenimiento!!

(Translated by Google)
We went to the campsite, it was a disaster!!! Don't go, dirty bathrooms, broken tables, no maintenance whatsoever!!

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
I'm not giving it 5 stars because of the lube center, whose system never works according to the man who works there.

reviews.comment:
Un desastre atendiendo tienen a una persona que es muy mayor de edad no puede caminar muy bien y lo tienen en atención al público son muy explotadores, aunque el resto de los empleados son un desastre igual, ninguno respeta las normas de seguridad de hacer que los vehículos estacionen del lado donde esta la tapa de tanque de combustible, no pienso ir más al menos de un caso de urgencia

(Translated by Google)
The service is a disaster. They have an elderly person who can't walk very well working in customer service; they're very exploitative. Although the rest of the employees are equally terrible, none of them respect the safety rules about parking vehicles on the side with the fuel tank cap. I don't plan to go back, unless it's an emergency.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHamF1eWd3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Sobre todo el hermoso parque que tiene detrás del la estación de servicio para pasar el día. Tiene parrillas y baños.. Muy piola...

(Translated by Google)
Especially the beautiful park behind the gas station, perfect for spending the day. It has grills and restrooms. Really cool...
